creator: Andrew@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like we are hitting an assert in clang (with both 3.6 from base, and 3.8 from upstream):

Assertion failed: (RegParmMax < 7 && "RegParmMax value is larger than AST can handle"), function getRegParmMax, file /home/andrew/freebsd/repo/llvm/tools/clang/include/clang/Basic/TargetInfo.h, line 823.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
